title: Dentist / Orthodontist | Tanjong Pagar CBD
description:
Step into Dentalis — a boutique dental clinic housed in a beautifully restored heritage shophouse at Tanjong Pagar. Designed with an urban spa aesthetic and art gallery–like calm, our clinic offers a serene, premium environment where you can focus on what you do best: delivering exceptional dentistry.

We are seeking experienced Dentist or Orthodontist who share our passion for delivering exceptional care and who want to grow with a dental practice focused on long-term patient relationships, precision dentistry, and a tranquil, supportive setting.

Location & Work Hours

  • Location: 52 Craig Rd (near Tanjong Pagar / Maxwell / Outram MRT)
  • Hours: Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 9am-1pm (5.5-day week)

Requirements

  • Full registration with the Singapore Dental Council (and Specialist Accreditation Board for specialists)
  • Dental Degree from Singapore (BDS) or recognised by the Singapore Dental Council
  • Currently residing and practising in Singapore

Why join us?

  • Attractive remuneration with potential partnership opportunities
  • New dental practice with modern, fully digital clinic with advanced technology
  • Friendly, supportive DA/reception team
  • Collaborative, patient-first work culture
  • Worklife balance — no night shifts

Apply: Send your resume to dentalis.office@gmail.com

postedCompany.description:
Discover Your Future at Dentalis: Redefining Dental Care in Singapore


Escape the ordinary at Dentalis, your urban oasis for gentle, quality dental care in the heart of Tanjong Pagar CBD. Our Singapore dental clinic is a tranquil retreat designed to put even the most nervous patients at ease. Led by Dr Jonathan Liu, we combine digital dentistry for precision with compassion and good chairside manners to provide a full range of dental services, including Invisalign, Teeth Whitening, Root Canal Treatment, Wisdom Tooth Extraction and more. We are a Medisave and CHAS-approved dental clinic, conveniently located in a charming heritage Chinatown shophouse near the MRTs.

At Dentalis, our philosophy extends beyond clinical excellence to fostering a supportive and enriching workplace. We pride ourselves on cultivating a five-star patient experience that mirrors the unparalleled hospitality standards found in world-class services. This commitment to excellence is reflected in every aspect of our operations, from our meticulous clinic ambiance to our seamless administrative processes.

Joining Dentalis means becoming part of a dynamic team that deeply values your well-being and professional growth. We champion a healthy work-life balance with predictable schedules, offering consistent daytime hours and absolutely no evening or night shifts. Our 5.5-day work week ensures you have ample time for personal pursuits, free from an overtime culture. This unique work environment provides an invaluable opportunity to hone and develop world-class service skills within the healthcare sector, contributing to a team that truly makes a difference.

Our prime location in Tanjong Pagar provides unparalleled convenience. We are just minutes away from Outram, Maxwell, and Tanjong Pagar MRT stations, and within easy reach of nearby carparks at Craig Place and Pinnacles @ Duxton, making your commute effortless.


At Dentalis, we don't just meet expectations – we redefine them, one exceptional patient experience at a time. Come be a part of our journey to set new benchmarks in dental care in Singapore.
postedCompany.name: DENTALIS PTE. LTD.
